evidence.description: The Amal Movement was created by Musa al-Sadr, Mostafa Chamran, and Hussein el-Husseini as the military wing of the Movement of the Deprived.

evidence.source_title: From Texas to Dehlavieh: A look at the life of Martyr Mustafa Chamran — Khamenei.ir
evidence.description: Chamran engaged in training manpower in southern Lebanon in cooperation with Imam Musa Sadr, serving as the military commander of Amal.

editorial_notes: Co-founded with Musa al-Sadr. Chamran was its first military commander.
